## Title

View Admin Dashboard Metrics

## User Story

**As an** admin

**I want** to view summarized system data (transactions, facilities, sales, reservations)

**So that** I can monitor overall system performance

## Story Points

5

## Tasks

- [ ] Design dashboard UI
- [ ] Fetch data from database
- [ ] Display charts/cards (transactions, sales, etc.)
- [ ] Test data accuracy

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Dashboard displays updated metrics
- [ ] Data is accurate and consistent
- [ ] UI is responsive

## Given / When / Then

Given the system has stored data,

When the admin opens the dashboard,

Then key metrics are displayed correctly

## Validation and Evidence

**Validation method**

UI & data validation

**Related repository evidence**

docs/dashboard.md
